name: per_player_touch_rate_type_year_split
description: Test case for per_player_touch rate type with year split across multiple years
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t846aa1cfb5ea37d6e0869f78bff00232" as materialized (select "t"."pid" as "pid", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" cross join LATERAL (VALUES (nfl_plays.bc_pid), (CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.trg_pid END)) AS t(pid) where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and t.pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023) group by "t"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "rate_aggregate_62df8625d003" as materialized (select "nfl_games"."year", nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS m_dc7a82da7c34 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2022, 2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid, "nfl_games"."year") select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_62df8625d003.m_dc7a82da7c34) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t846aa1cfb5ea37d6e0869f78bff00232.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS trg_from_plays_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t846aa1cfb5ea37d6e0869f78bff00232" on "t846aa1cfb5ea37d6e0869f78bff00232"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t846aa1cfb5ea37d6e0869f78bff00232"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "rate_aggregate_62df8625d003" on "rate_aggregate_62df8625d003"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rate_aggregate_62df8625d003"."year" = "player_years"."year" group by "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
